title: penstemon interruptus
intro: Penstemon interruptus, also known as the bushy beardtongue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Penstemon interruptus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Penstemon interruptus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
